channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Highlights and Key Issues from California's 2026 Gubernatorial Debate
item.description: During the nationally televised CNN debate for California's 2026 governor race, seven leading candidates clashed over major issues including healthcare, immigration, housing, and campaign ethics. Demo...

item.title: Guidance and Reflections for Tamil Nadu's Chief Minister-elect Joseph Vijay
item.description: Gopalkrishna Gandhi, a concerned citizen of Tamil Nadu, has penned an open letter to Chief Minister-elect C. Joseph Vijay congratulating him on his electoral success. While Gandhi was not among the 35...

item.title: Sarah Wonders Becomes Mother at 40 After 13 Years of Waiting Through Faith
item.description: Sarah Wonders, a musician, has shared her joyful testimony after welcoming her firstborn child at the age of 40. She waited for 13 long years to conceive, holding on to her faith in God throughout the...

item.title: Rare Andes strain of hantavirus confirmed in cruise ship outbreak victims in South Africa
item.description: South Africa’s National Institute for Communicable Diseases has identified the Andes strain of hantavirus in victims linked to an outbreak on the luxury cruise ship MV Hondius. This strain is notable ...

item.title: African Governments Respond to Xenophobic Violence in South Africa
item.description: Diplomatic tensions are escalating across Africa as renewed xenophobic attacks in South Africa have prompted several nations to threaten retaliatory measures. Between 27 and 29 April 2026, protests an...

item.title: Batangas Female Cadet Tops PMA Class of 2026
item.description: Cadet First Class Christine Kaye Librada from Lipa City, Batangas, has emerged as the valedictorian of the Philippine Military Academy (PMA) Talang Dangal Class of 2026. Daughter of a retired military...

item.title: FG bans honorary degree holders from using 'Dr' title to protect academic integrity
item.description: The Federal Government don decide say people wey carry honorary degrees no go fit add 'Dr' to their names again. Dis announcement come from Minister of Education, Tunji Alausa, wey talk for press brie...

item.title: MV Hondius cruise ship with hantavirus cases to dock in Spain's Canary Islands after outbreak
item.description: A luxury expedition cruise ship, the MV Hondius, has been at the centre of a hantavirus outbreak while marooned off the coast of Cape Verde. The vessel, which departed from Ushuaia, Argentina in March...

item.title: Kenyan Aviation Expert Calls for Visa-Free Africa and Open Skies to Grow Tourism
item.description: A leading Kenyan aviation expert, Charles Gakuu, has strongly pushed for major changes in Africa's aviation and travel sectors to unlock the continent's huge tourism potential. Speaking during the IAT...

item.title: Celebrating David Attenborough’s 100 Years and His Contribution to Wildlife Education
item.description: David Attenborough, a beloved natural historian and broadcaster, has reached the remarkable milestone of 100 years. For decades, his documentaries have brought the wonders of the natural world into ho...

item.title: Mmusi Maimane reports theft of valuables during stay in France hotel
item.description: Build One SA (Bosa) leader Mmusi Maimane has shared that he fell victim to theft while on a recent trip to France. In a WhatsApp status update, Maimane noted that despite staying in numerous hotels ac...

item.title: Macau Black Knights Defeat Phoenix Fuel Masters to Close Out PBA Commissioner's Cup
item.description: In a matchup at the PBA Commissioner's Cup, the Macau Black Knights secured a victory against the Phoenix Fuel Masters, marking the conclusion of their participation in this conference. This game high...

item.title: Full Team Line-ups and Changes for AFL Round Nine Featuring Fremantle and Hawthorn
item.description: Round nine of the 2026 AFL season sees both Fremantle Dockers and Hawthorn Hawks finalising their line-ups ahead of their upcoming clash. Fremantle has made a single change, bringing in J. McVee to re...

item.title: Showcase of Five Exceptional Architect-Designed Homes Across Australia
item.description: Architects have a unique ability to transform spaces, turning ordinary homes into extraordinary living environments. This article highlights five architect-designed luxury homes currently on the marke...

item.title: Ruto Emphasizes Accountability and Regional Cooperation in Leadership
item.description: KENYAN President William Ruto, while speaking in Dodoma at the Tanzanian Parliament on May 5, 2026, highlighted that true leadership is about being accountable, keeping promises, and delivering real r...

item.title: Naira Appreciates Further Against Dollar to N1,362 on May 6 2026
item.description: According to fresh data from Central Bank of Nigeria, the naira don show strong performance as e appreciate to N1,362 per dollar on Tuesday, May 6 2026. This one na improvement from the N1,367.5 per d...

item.title: Ex-North Lanarkshire Council Leader Sentenced for Sexual Offences Against Young Men
item.description: Jordan Linden, former leader of North Lanarkshire Council and chair of the Scottish Youth Parliament, has been sentenced to 18 months in prison for sexually assaulting five young men and sending unwan...

item.title: Senate Leader Urges Transparency in APC Primaries, Rejects Undemocratic Consensus
item.description: The Leader of the Nigerian Senate, Senator Opeyemi Bamidele, don carry matter wey concern APC primaries come Abuja. Him dey beg make all processes for the party dey transparent and make dem follow law...

item.title: US World Cup 2026 hotel bookings fall short of forecasts amid visa concerns and cancelled room blocks
item.description: A recent survey by the American Hotel and Lodging Association (AHLA) reveals that hotel bookings in US host cities for the FIFA World Cup 2026 are significantly underperforming compared to initial exp...

item.title: Shashi Shekhar Vempati Takes Charge as CBFC Chairperson
item.description: Shashi Shekhar Vempati, the former chief executive officer of Prasar Bharati, has been appointed as the new chairperson of the Central Board of Film Certification (CBFC) for a tenure of three years. H...
